make-this-meatball-broth-with-vegetables.name: Make This Meatball Broth With Vegetables
make-this-meatball-broth-with-vegetables.original_name: Haz este caldo de albóndigas con verduras
instructions: Vamos a iniciar con la receta, preparando todos los ingredientes.
In a bowl, you will add beef, cumin, pepper, salt, garlic powder, egg and ground bread and mix until everything completely integrates.
Once our seedling flesh, you'll make balls of the same size all. When they're ready, we'll have them booked.

make-ahead-rhubarb-yogurt-parfaits.name: Make-ahead Rhubarb Yogurt Parfaits
instructions: Combine rhubarb, water, and salt in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat; bring to a boil, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer, stirring occasionally, until rhubarb has broken down, 6 to 8 minutes. Stir in honey; cook and stir until mixture has thickened, 2 to 3 minutes.

Arrange five 12- to 16-ounce jars on a work surface. Place 2 tablespoons rhubarb mixture in the bottom of each jar; top each with 2 tablespoons graham cracker crumbs and each with ⅔ cup yogurt, in that order. Divide remaining rhubarb mixture and graham cracker crumbs among parfaits; top each with 1 tablespoon walnuts.
Seal jars; refrigerate until ready to eat.

manchego-cheese-pate-recipe-comedera.name: Manchego Cheese pâté recipe
manchego-cheese-pate-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de paté de queso manchego

ingredients.item: 1 cda de aceite de oliva (extra virgen)

instructions: Ralla el queso manchego finamente para que se integre mejor a la mezcla.
En un procesador agrega el queso manchego rallado, el queso crema, la mantequilla y la crema para batir.
Procesa hasta obtener una textura cremosa.
It incorporates Dijon mustard, lemon juice, black pepper and olive oil.
Reprocess to achieve a smooth and homogenous blend.
Place the pate in an airtight and refrigerates for 30 minutes so that flavors are integrated and better texture.
Serves and goes with bread toast, raw or salted cookies.
Enjoy!

mango-bread.name: Mango Bread

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 325°. Lightly coat a 9x5" loaf pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray. Line with parchment paper, leaving overhang on long sides. Whisk 2 cups (250 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. baking powder, ¼ tsp. baking soda, and ¼ tsp. freshly grated nutmeg in a medium bowl to combine. Set aside.
Blend 8 oz. frozen mango chunks, thawed (about 1½ cups), including any juices, in a blender until very smooth. Transfer 1 Tbsp. mango purée to a medium bowl and set aside for making the glaze.

Add 3 large eggs, zest of 1 lime, 1½ cups (300 g) granulated sugar, ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, melted, slightly cooled, ¼ cup vegetable oil, and 1 Tbsp. vanilla extract to remaining purée in blender; blend until smooth. Pour into bowl with reserved dry ingredients and stir gently with a whisk or rubber spatula until no large dry streaks of flour remain (some small lumps are okay). Scrape batter into prepared pan and place on a small rimmed baking sheet.

Bake bread until golden brown and top springs back when gently pressed in the center, 40–50 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet; let bread cool in pan 20 minutes. Turn bread out onto rack; peel away parchment and discard. Let cool completely.

Add 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted, slightly cooled, 1 Tbsp. fresh lime juice, and a large pinch of kosher salt to bowl with reserved mango purée; whisk to combine. Sift 1½ cups (165 g) powdered sugar over and whisk until a thick glaze forms (it should thickly coat a spoon; if runny, add more sifted powdered sugar 2 Tbsp. at a time until you reach desired consistency).

Pour glaze over bread (for a flat finish, glaze bottom of loaf), letting it run down sides. Scatter thin strips of lime zest, if using, over glaze while still wet. Let sit until glaze is set, at least 45 minutes.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 2 days ahead. Store covered at room temperature.

maple-pecan-and-sour-cherry-granola-bars.name: Maple, Pecan, And Sour Cherry Granola Bars
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Toss oats, pecans, pumpkin seeds, coconut, flaxseed, and almonds on a rimmed baking sheet. Toast, stirring occasionally, until coconut is lightly golden brown, 10–15 minutes.

Reduce oven temperature to 325°. Transfer oat mixture to a large bowl and stir in wheat germ and cherries. Bring maple syrup, brown sugar, coconut oil, vanilla, and salt to a boil in a small saucepan and cook, stirring occasionally, until sugar dissolves, about 4 minutes. Let cool 15 minutes, then whisk in egg white. Pour over oat mixture and stir until coated. Scrape into a 13x9" parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet and bake until deep golden brown, 45–55 minutes. Let cool 30 minutes, then cut into bars.
Do Ahead: Granola can be made 3 weeks ahead. Store in an airtight container.

mash-cauliflower.name: Mash Cauliflower

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place cauliflower and water in a microwave-safe bowl; microwave until tender, 6 to 7 minutes. Do not drain.
Add cream cheese and butter to the bowl; mash until smooth. Stir in green onions until incorporated; season with salt and black pepper.

mastelo-sifnos-argiro.name: Mastelo Sifnos

ingredients.item: 3 kg of goat or lamb cut into large pieces
Red wine (1 bottle for washing and extra 1 glass for recipe)
3 kg of goat or lamb cut into large pieces
Red wine (1 bottle for washing and extra 1 glass for recipe)

instructions: The Sifnos masto, prepared on the Great Saturday afternoon and kept on the mast until it is eaten all.
In the inner lower part of the mast (the clay pot shaped vessel) we place 4-5 vine bars cleaned, crossed, in order to create a "fish".
Wash every piece of meat first with water and then with red wine,
Add salt and pepper to the meat and place on the vines.
In each layer of meat we place, with a knife chop the dill and spread it over.

Finally, add a glass of red wine, close the vessel with wet parchment paper or aluminum foil making a few small holes (so that the meat gets the aroma of the oven) and take it to the village oven where it will first be cooked in a strong fire and then in a quiet, with branches until the dawn of the next day (Sunday Easter).

matcha-tiramisu-recipe-lezzet.name: Matcha Tiramisu Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup of honey or akç beerç mixed (optional)
Labne cheese (better and slightly sour taste)
By blend yogurt and cream (for light cream)
Milk Cream (prefer those who are light)
Coconut cream (for vegan and different aroma)

If the egg does not want to be used, the consistency with dust gelatin or agar agar can be increased (it has a different structure).
Green made of powder or powder; leaves (aroma can be different, the taste becomes light)

instructions: 1. Benmari usulu or wrap eggs in the mixer and powder sugar up to the area of the cream color crack
2. Add masscarpone cheese to the mixture and mix push slowly with the spatula until smooth.
3. &ccedil until the cold cream is solidified in a separate container.
4. Then add slowly to the mixture of masscarpone and stir to the gentle&ccedil with spatula.
5. Milk heat (do not worry), into 2 mins of matcha powder and optional honey add and mix thoroughly dissolve.
6. Cat language biscuits are quickly matchalı suede (for very unable).

mcandrews-irish-soda-bread.name: Mcandrews' Irish Soda Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a baking sheet, or line with parchment paper.

In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. In another bowl, whisk together eggs, buttermilk, and corn oil. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture, and pour in the buttermilk mixture. Add the raisins, and stir a few times, just until the ingredients come together into a soft dough. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface, and with floured hands shape dough into a ball. Place the dough on the prepared baking sheet, and cut a large cross in the top with a sharp knife.
Place the bread on a middle rack of the preheated oven, and bake until golden brown, 30 to 40 minutes.

meat-candy.name: Meat Candy
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a large baking dish with aluminum foil.

Stir cayenne pepper into brown sugar in a bowl. Wrap each smoked sausage in a piece of bacon; secure each with a toothpick. Arrange wrapped sausages into prepared baking dish. Pack brown sugar around wrapped sausages to cover by about 1/2 inch. Cover pan tightly with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes. Increase oven heat to 232°C (230 degrees C). Remove aluminum foil from pan.
Continue baking in the hot oven until brown sugar has melted and thickened, 30 to 40 minutes.

meat-pita-lezzet.name: Meat Pita
instructions: 1. For dough, breeze the dough into the kneading container.
2. Add and blend salt.
3. Open the middle like the pool and add yeast and water.
4. Smooth medium knead until you get a dough in softness.
5. Cover the excess with a cloth and wait for at least half an hour for yeast.
6. Peel onions and tomatoes for inner material and shore.
7. Take a deep coarse and mix and add chopped parsley, grass, corn extract oil and pepper.
8. Cut the dough into 4 equal glands.
9. Open the dandruff by pressing on your hand on the sprinkled countertop.
10. Spread the oven tray from dandruff to 2 tablespoons.
11. 11. Place the pide on the lubricated oven tray.
12. Share the scraped inner material that you have prepared in advance.
12. August Place two-cut cherry tomatoes.
14 July Cook for 20 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 200 degrees.
15. Serve hot or warm.
16.  Afiyet olsun.
17. September You can find here to the tribute to the meatballs with a detailed description.

meatball-stuffed-garlic-bread-sliders.name: Meatball-stuffed Garlic Bread Sliders

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and 2 cloves garlic; cook and stir until onion is soft, about 5 minutes.

Place beef in a large bowl. Add onion-garlic mixture, parsley, egg, bread crumbs, and 1 large handful of fontina cheese, reserving the rest for topping. Season with salt, pepper, and cayenne. Mix by hand until just combined. Scoop meat mixture into 24 mini muffin cups; meatballs need not be perfectly round.
Bake in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the centers, about 12 minutes. Leave oven on. Let meatballs cool briefly while you make the garlic butter.
Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Add remaining minced garlic once butter starts to bubble; stir, then immediately remove from heat. Stir well and set aside.

Line a rimmed baking sheet with foil; coat foil with remaining olive oil. Transfer rolls, still attached, to the baking sheet. Cut a hole in the top of each roll, about 2/3 of the way down. Brush garlic butter over the insides and outsides of the rolls.

Bake until golden brown, about 8 minutes. Pour about 1 tablespoon tomato sauce into each hole. Stuff meatballs into the holes. Top each roll with a spoonful of tomato sauce and remaining fontina cheese. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
Continue baking until cheese is melted, 12 to 15 minutes. Garnish with more parsley. Let rolls sit for 5 to 10 minutes to firm up; transfer to a serving platter.

meatballs-in-almond-sauce-pequerecetas.name: Meatballs In Almond Sauce

ingredients.item: 500 g de carne picada mixta de cerdo y ternera
100 g de pan rallado o miga de pan mojado en leche
1 taza de caldo de pollo o verduras
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: The first thing you have to do is purge the bread crumbling with milk. Mix well and run. Then, in a separate bowl, add minced meat, egg, minced garlic, nutmeg and ground nail and mix of bread and milk. Reaping to taste and amasa up to a homogenous blend. It forms balls with dough and paddles them with wheat flour to bounce them and cuts the excess flour. In a frying pan, heats abundant oil and fres the meatballs till they are golden throughout. Remove the meatballs and place them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil.

In a big frying pan, have an almond at medium heat till they are golden. Remove the almonds from the frying pan and put them aside. In the same frying pan, slightly tweets cuts of bread. Withdraw from the fire and place the almonds and toasted bread in a mortar, pounding everything. In another frying pan, add a little more olive oil and splits the onion finely minced and garlic also finely minced until they are soft and golden. Add the minced almond pits and white wine and cook with live fire for 5 minutes till alcohol evaporate. Now add the chicken or vegetable stock, the sweet pimenton and the bay leaf. Let them cook at low heat for about 15 minutes till the sauce has been weighed. Triple the salsa with a mixer till smooth. If the sauce remains too thick, add a little more chicken stock or vegetables.

Put the meatballs back into the frying pan with the almond sauce and let them cook with low heat for about 10 more minutes to get them well impregnated with the taste of the salsa. Serve meatballs in hot almond sauce, sprinkle with chopped parsley above.

mediterranean-seafood-stew.name: Mediterranean Seafood Stew

ingredients.prep: cut in half and thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until tender, about 10 minutes. Drain and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and pepper flakes; cook and stir until onion is soft, 5 to 7 minutes. Add garlic; cook 1 minute.
Increase heat to medium-high; add potatoes, tomatoes, and white wine. Bring to a simmer; cook, breaking up tomatoes with a spoon, 8 to 10 minutes. Add fish stock; return to a simmer.
Nestle white fish into broth; simmer for 2 to 3 minutes. Add clams, shrimp, and calamari; simmer until shrimp are pink and clams have opened, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove and discard any unopened clams.
Off heat, stir in basil, parsley, lemon zest, and lemon juice; season with salt and black pepper.

mexican-poblano-rice-recipe-comedera.name: Mexican Poblano Rice Recipe
instructions: Lava y pela los ajos, el cilantro, el chile (retira las semillas).
En un vaso de licuadora, agrega el chile poblano, los dientes de ajo, la cebolla,  y el manojo de cilantro.
Add water cups and chicken bucket.
He's good at an average speed for 1 minute.
A frying pan with medium heat warmes up an oil jet.
When it's hot, I should start pounding some smoke. It then incorporates the rice and cook up to a constant motif, about 5 minutes.
Incorporates 2 cups of the blend of the village chili, ½ teaspoons of salt and revels a little.
Add elote grains, stir up something else.
Cover and let cook at least 25 to 30 minutes.
When ready, put out the fire, slightly move the rice, cover and let rest for 10 more minutes.
Sirve.

mexican-style-chicken-stuffed-peppers.name: Mexican-style Chicken-stuffed Peppers

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: {'step': 'Preheat the oven to 200 degrees C.'}

{'step': 'Heat butter and oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Saute onion in the hot pan until soft, about 5 minutes. Add chicken; cook and stir until browned and no longer pink in the center, 7 to 10 minutes.'}
{'step': 'Reduce heat to medium, and add water and chili powder. Stir in garlic, salt, cumin, and red pepper; let cook for 5 minutes. Add rice and black beans.'}

{'step': 'Transfer chicken mixture to a bowl. Pour most of the crushed tomatoes into a large baking pan so it is 1 inch deep. Stuff the chicken mixture into the bell pepper halves until slightly overfilled and place open-side up in the tomatoes.'}
{'step': 'Pour remaining crushed tomatoes over the peppers so they are just covered. Sprinkle with Mexican cheese, and cover the pan.'}
{'step': 'Bake in the preheated oven until peppers are soft, about 50 minutes.'}
{'step': 'Serve hot with avocado and sour cream to garnish.'}

meyer-lemon-shortcakes-with-meyer-lemon-.name: Meyer Lemon Shortcakes With Meyer Lemon Curd And Mixed Citrus "marmalade

ingredients.item: Fresh meyer lemon juice or regular fresh lemon juice
(packed) finely grated meyer lemon peel or regular lemon peel
(packed) finely grated meyer lemon peel or regular lemon peel
Plus 2 tablespoons chilled heavy whipping cream

instructions: Whisk eggs, egg yolks, sugar, lemon juice, lemon peel, and coarse salt in medium metal bowl to blend well. Set bowl over saucepan of simmering water (do not allow bottom of bowl to touch water). Whisk constantly until mixture thickens and instant-read thermometer inserted into mixture registers 77°C to 78°C, 5 to 6 minutes (do not allow to boil). Remove bowl from over water. Whisk butter into curd, 2 to 3 cubes at a time, allowing butter to melt before adding more and whisking until curd is smooth. Press plastic wrap directly onto surface of curd and refrigerate overnight.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Line rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, and coarse salt in medium bowl to blend well. Stir in lemon peel. Add butter cubes and rub in with fingertips until mixture resembles coarse meal. Add 1 cup cream and stir just until dough begins to clump together. Gather dough together. Turn dough out onto lightly floured surface and press out to 7-inch round (about 1 inch thick). Using 2¼-inch-diameter cookie cutter dipped into flour, cut out rounds. Reshape dough scraps and cut out additional dough rounds for total of 8.

Transfer biscuits to prepared baking sheet, spacing 1 inch apart. Brush top of biscuits with remaining 2 tablespoons heavy whipping cream; sprinkle with raw sugar. Bake until biscuits are golden and tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 20 minutes. Transfer biscuits to rack and cool completely.
Using electric mixer, beat 1 cup cream and 2 tablespoons sugar in medium bowl until peaks form.

Cut biscuits horizontally in half. Place bottom half of each biscuit on plate. Top each with 1 heaping tablespoon lemon curd, then generous spoonful of Mixed Citrus 'Marmalade.' Top with whipped cream topping. Cover each with top half of biscuit. Dust shortcakes with powdered sugar.

mezcal-cocktail.name: Mezcal Cocktail
instructions: Bring 3 cups water to a simmer in a medium saucepan. Remove from heat and add hibiscus; let steep 10 minutes. Strain hibiscus tea into a medium bowl; let cool.

Bring 1 cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan. Add sugar and cook, stirring, until dissolved. Remove from heat; add 2 cups cilantro. Let steep 20 minutes. Strain syrup into a small bowl; let cool.

To make cocktail, muddle remaining 1 cup cilantro in a large pitcher. Add mezcal, lime juice, hibiscus tea, and 1¼ cups cilantro syrup and stir to combine. Taste and add more syrup if desired, keeping in mind that the flavor will be diluted once you add ice.
Divide cocktail among ice-filled glasses. Garnish with cilantro flowers.

microwave-turkey-steaks-teleculinaria.name: Microwave Turkey Steaks
instructions: Season the turkey steaks with salt, pepper and lemon juice, wrap them around and hold them with a toothpick. Place them in a container that can go to the microwave, water them with 1 spoon (soak) of the olive oil and the white wine and take it to the microwave at 1000 watts for 15 minutes.

Peel the onion, cut it in half-moons, lay it in another microwave container, add the remaining olive oil, tape and take to the microwave at 1000 watts for 5 minutes. Then add the mustard, ketchup and orange juice, season with salt and take it back to the microwave at the same power for 2 minutes.
Junte a mistura de cebola aos rolinhos com o molho, misture, rejeite os palitos e sirva polvilhado com salsa picada. Pode acompanhar com arroz ou massa cozida a gosto.

milk-cream-kitchen-robot-teleculinaria.name: Milk Cream (kitchen Robot)
instructions: Put in the robot cup the milk, yolks, sugar and moreena flour and turn 15 seconds at speed 4.
Add mint and cardamom seeds and program at 90oC for 12 minutes at speed 2. Dispose of the mint, immediately lay on a platter and let it cool.
Sprinkle with the lemon zest and enough brown sugar and burn with your own iron or a kitchen torch. Serve right away.

mini-hasselback-potatoes.name: Mini Hasselback Potatoes

ingredients.item: . plus 1 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: plus more thinly sliced for serving

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in lower third of oven; preheat to 425°. Place 1 baby Yukon Gold, peewee, or new potato, scrubbed, on a cutting board so a long side is facing you and arrange a chopstick or the handle of a wooden spoon along each long side. Using a long knife, cut potato crosswise into ⅛"-thick slices, stopping at chopsticks (about ¼" before you cut all the way through). Transfer to a large bowl. Repeat with remaining potatoes.

Drizzle cut hasselback potatoes with ⅓ cup extra-virgin olive oil and sprinkle with 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 2¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and 1 tsp. freshly ground black pepper. Gently massage oil all over potatoes, making sure to work some into slits. Arrange potatoes, cut side up, on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet, spacing at least 1" apart. Cover tightly with foil and bake potatoes until just barely tender, 20–25 minutes. Remove foil and continue to bake until tops of potatoes are golden brown and crisp, 40–45 minutes more.
Stir together 2 garlic cloves, finely grated, and remaining 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a small bowl, then brush over hot potatoes.

Stir 1 cup sour cream, ⅓ cup mayonnaise, 2 Tbsp. finely chopped chives, 2 tsp. onion powder, 2 tsp. Worcestershire sauce, 1 tsp. fresh lemon juice, 1 garlic clove, finely grated, ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper in a medium bowl to combine. Taste and season with more salt and/or pepper if needed.
Spread sour cream mixture over a platter; arrange potatoes, cut sides up, on top. Scatter thinly sliced chives over, then sprinkle with flaky sea salt and more pepper.

mini-meatloaves-and-roasted-veggies.name: Mini Meatloaves And Roasted Veggies

ingredients.item: Ragú® old world style® traditional sauce

ingredients.prep: such as quartered mushrooms, broccoli florets, sweet pepper cut into 1-inch pieces, or zucchini cut into 1-inch chunks

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Line a 15x10x1-inch baking pan with foil, coat a twelve 2 1/2-inch muffin tin with nonstick cooking spray; set aside.
In a medium bowl combine beef, onion, 1/2 cup of RAGÚ® Old World Style® Traditional Sauce, bread crumbs, egg, parsley, garlic, 1/4 tsp salt and 1/8 tsp pepper.
Divide mixture among muffin cups, pressing meat mixture into each.

In a large bowl toss the vegetables with oil, remaining salt and remaining pepper. Place in the baking pan. Place the baking pan and muffin cups on two separate oven racks. Bake 30 minutes or until an instant-read thermometer inserted in meat loaves registers 71°C. Remove pans from oven. Remove meatloaves from muffin cups. Serve meatloaves topped with remaining warmed RAGÚ® Old World Style® Traditional Sauce with vegetables on the side, and garnish with additional chopped parsley.

mint-cooler.name: Mint Cooler
instructions: Reserve four mint leaves for garnish. Combine remaining mint leaves and lime cordial in a blender; process until mint is finely ground. Stir in club soda. Serve in tall glasses over ice, garnished with lime slices and reserved mint leaves.

mixed-jelly-a-peruvian-delicacy-comedera.name: Mixed Jelly, A Peruvian Delicacy

ingredients.item: 1 cda ralladura de jengibre o kion
100 gr gr de harina de trigo

instructions: Take fish steaks, previously clean, and cut them into pieces.
Haz lo propio con los camarones, lo vas a limpiar. Corta los calamares y la sepia en rodajas.
Fold the fish and seafood into a bowl to suit them with all our spices: salt, pepper, garlic, aji and ground pepper.
Also, add the ginger and lemon juice. That's a good mix.
Then you'll have him put up for ten minutes at the freezer. That will make fish and seafood compact and juicy at frying.
Bate el huevo a punto de viene y esparce la harina en una bandeja.
Put a frying pan with abundant oil with medium heat. While it's hot, let's get the fish and seafood out of the freezer and start pounding them. Pass them for an egg, then for flour.
Then start frying them into hot oil, till they are doradito and cooked from inside and crispy from outside.
Put them into an absorbing paper to remove excess oil. Reserve.

mozzarella-di-bufala-with-shell-beans.name: Mozzarella Di Bufala With Shell Beans

ingredients.item: Kosher salt plus more for seasoning

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced on the diagonal (about 1 cup)
halved diagonally, or one 12-ounce ball cut into 8 equal pieces

instructions: Make a bouquet garni: Place the onion, garlic, and sage in center of the cheesecloth and tie into a bundle with kitchen twine; place in a large saucepan. Add the beans and fill saucepan with water to cover by 3”. Bring water to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until beans are tender but not mushy, about 30 minutes for fresh beans or 1–1 1/2 hours for dried (time will vary depending on freshness of beans). Turn off heat and let beans cool in cooking water. Drain; discard the bouquet garni. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill the beans in the cooking liquid.

Combine half of the basil and half of the oil, along with the pine nuts, garlic, and 1/2 teaspoon salt, in a blender. Pulse, occasionally scraping mixture down the sides of the blender, until basil is finely chopped. Add the remaining basil and oil and pulse until loose paste forms. Season the pesto to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Pesto can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring pesto to room temperature before using.

Cook the fresh beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Drain the beans and place them in a bowl of ice water until cool. Cut beans on a diagonal into 2” pieces. Combine the shell beans, fresh beans, and scallions in a medium bowl. Add the lemon juice and 3 tablespoons of the pesto and toss to coat vegetables. Season with salt. Reserve remaining pesto for another use. Place 1 piece of cheese in the center of each plate. Divide 3/4 of the bean mixture among plates. Arrange another piece of cheese on top of beans, then spoon the remaining bean mixture over. Garnish the salad with tomatoes, if desired.

muhlama-recipe-lezzet.name: Muhlama Recipe

ingredients.item: 1.5 cup of water (or milky water mixture)
200 grams of kolot cheese (or vine cheese, trabzon cheese)
Half spoon salt (set according to the salt rate)

instructions: 1. Take a large copper or cast pan butter.
2. Completely melt in the cross fire, foam and color light döin to the next stage when pushed to pass.
3. &Uuml add corn flour to the car.
4. Coffee with wood spoon; roast 3–4 minutes.
5. The smell of the End should not be removed but more darkened.
6. Add hot water (or milky water mixture).
7. Sumake the opaque of wet by blend it with meat.
8. Bake until the sunset is dark.
9. Add salt and sliced colto cheese when reaching the appearance.
10. Wait for the slow melt of the cheese without stirring in the chopped fire.
11. 11. Oil &ccedil from the edges is ready to be used when it starts torn.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

mussels-with-white-wine.name: Mussels With White Wine

ingredients.item: Chopped fresh dill plus more for serving
Chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley plus more for serving

instructions: Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add shallots and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened not browned, about 5 minutes. Add wine and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until liquid is reduced by half, 3-4 minutes. Add mussels, cover, and cook, shaking pot occasionally, until shells open (discard any that do not open), 10–12 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer mussels to shallow bowls.
Add butter to cooking liquid and stir until melted. Add 2 Tbsp. dill and 2 Tbsp. parsley; season with salt and pepper. Ladle cooking liquid over mussels and top with more herbs.

20-minute-lemon-cheesecake.name: 20-minute Lemon Cheesecake
instructions: Bring a medium pot filled with a couple inches of water to a simmer. Set a heatproof bowl on top, making sure the bottom is not touching the water. Add the cream cheese and sugar to the bowl and stir to incorporate, then let melt.
Meanwhile, add the water and gelatin to a small bowl and let bloom until the water is absorbed, 2–3 minutes.
Once the cream cheese softens and turns off white in color, add the lemon juice, vanilla, and lemon zest. Whisk to incorporate and remove any lumps.
Add the bloomed gelatin to the cream cheese mixture and whisk until fully melted and incorporated.
Remove the bowl from the double boiler and freeze for 5–10 minutes, until cooled.
Remove the cream cheese mixture from the freezer and gradually fold in the whipped topping until well incorporated.
Scoop the filling into the mini graham cracker crusts. Freeze for 15 minutes, or until completely set.
Garnish with lemon wedges and mint, then serve.
Enjoy!
